task_completion.description: Verify that the five required milestone tiddlers have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the titles 'IRB Protocol Submission', 'Equipment Procurement', 'Participant Recruitment Phase 1', 'Interim Data Analysis', and 'Year 1 Progress Report to NIH' in the story river (main viewing area) or the 'Recent' tab in the right sidebar.

task_completion.description: Verify that the milestone tiddlers have the correct tag and custom fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On any visible milestone tiddler, look for a 'Milestone' tag pill just below the title. Also, look at the bottom of the tiddler for a custom fields table containing 'due-date' (e.g., 20250215) and 'status' (e.g., completed, in-progress, pending).

task_completion.description: Verify that the milestone tiddlers contain the correct descriptive body text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Read the text inside the visible milestone tiddlers. It should match the specific NIH study details provided in the prompt (e.g., 'Submit amended IRB protocol #2024-0847...', 'Procure and install ambulatory blood pressure monitors...').

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Project Timeline' dashboard tiddler.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tiddler titled 'Project Timeline' in the story river. It must have a 'Dashboard' tag pill visible below its title.

task_completion.description: Verify that the dashboard tiddler correctly uses a list widget to display the milestones in chronological order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the rendered view of the 'Project Timeline' tiddler. It should display a list of the milestones ordered by their due dates: 1. IRB Protocol Submission, 2. Equipment Procurement, 3. Participant Recruitment Phase 1, 4. Interim Data Analysis, 5. Year 1 Progress Report to NIH. The raw <$list> code should not be visible in the standard view mode, only the rendered links/titles.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the TiddlyWiki graphical interface to create the tiddlers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for signs of UI interaction such as open edit drafts, clicked '+' buttons, or the TiddlyWiki interface being actively used, rather than a terminal window running a script to modify the HTML file directly.

integrity.description: Verify the dashboard list is dynamically generated and not hardcoded.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the edit view of 'Project Timeline' is visible, ensure it contains TiddlyWiki widget syntax (e.g., <$list filter="[tag[Milestone]sort[due-date]]">) rather than plain text bullet points manually typed out by the agent.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the browser developer console/inspector is not open and being used to inject HTML directly into the page to simulate task completion.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires exactly 5 milestones with specific metadata: 1. 'IRB Protocol Submission' (due_date: 20250215, status: completed). 2. 'Equipment Procurement' (due_date: 20250301, status: completed). 3. 'Participant Recruitment Phase 1' (due_date: 20250430, status: in-progress). 4. 'Interim Data Analysis' (due_date: 20250715, status: pending). 5. 'Year 1 Progress Report to NIH' (due_date: 20251201, status: pending). The dashboard must sort these chronologically using the due-date field.
